testcase.name: test_dirty_and_staged_paths_are_only_feature_060b_paths

testcase.name: test_tiny_sweeps_run_deterministically_and_write_artifacts

failure.message: ValueError: Topology adjacency must be symmetric

testcase.failure: tests/integration/test_controlled_mechanistic_sweeps_flow.py:17: in test_tiny_sweeps_run_deterministically_and_write_artifacts first_report = first_runner.run() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/analysis/controlled_mechanistic_sweeps/runner.py:114: in run result = self._run_definition(definition) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/analysis/controlled_mechanistic_sweeps/runner.py:179: in _run_definition return self._run_topology_density(definition) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/analysis/controlled_mechanistic_sweeps/runner.py:279: in _run_topology_density topology = _topology_for_density(str(value)) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/analysis/controlled_mechanistic_sweeps/runner.py:86: in _topology_for_density return TopologyGraph(node_ids=("1", "2"), legal_adjacency={"1": ("2",)}) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ <string>:6: in __init__ ??? src/environment/topology.py:54: in __post_init__ _validate_simple_undirected_graph(canonical_nodes, normalized_adjacency) src/environment/topology.py:407: in _validate_simple_undirected_graph raise ValueError("Topology adjacency must be symmetric") E ValueError: Topology adjacency must be symmetric

testcase.name: test_local_path_has_no_transmission_metadata

failure.message:
AssertionError: Lists differ: ['transmission_start_slot', 'transmission_completion_slot'] != []
First list contains 2 additional elements. First extra element 0: 'transmission_start_slot'
- ['transmission_start_slot', 'transmission_completion_slot'] + []

testcase.failure: tests/integration/test_transmission_delay_runtime_wiring.py:194: in test_local_path_has_no_transmission_metadata self.assertEqual(transmission_keys, []) E AssertionError: Lists differ: ['transmission_start_slot', 'transmission_completion_slot'] != [] E E First list contains 2 additional elements. E First extra element 0: E 'transmission_start_slot' E E - ['transmission_start_slot', 'transmission_completion_slot'] E + []
